name: Shylily | Mating press!
description:
I wasn't thinking properly when making this. There's no plot, no story, no context, just pure smut! Obvious TW for girl cock, impregnation, and maybe rape? I'm not sure if I can count this as rape but there's the warning!

Do know that none of this makes any sense, I'm basically using porn logic because it's more fun that way! And because this was made to be a smut bot, meaning there's no need to do any plot or use basic logic, just like porn who would've thought.

If there's any minor spelling mistake please do tell me, I tend to have lots of grammar errors when writing too much because my brain can't handle it. This is my first time making a bot btw, it was a real struggle so sorry if it is bad or mediocre I'm really new to this.
creator: Silly-goober96
